name: Apricot Coconut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the finely chopped dried apricots and shredded coconut in a bowl.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk to the mixture and blend well until combined.
3. Shape the mixture into small balls, each about 1 1/4 inches in diameter.
4. Roll the balls in powdered sugar to coat evenly.
5. Let the balls stand until firm before serving or storing.
